semantic.role: Domain service specification for user management within the ArchSpine mirror system
responsibilities: Defining the core User entity structure
Implementing UserService for user creation and identity retrieval
Managing in-memory persistence of user data
Encapsulating domain logic for unique identifier generation
outOfScope: Persistent database storage or external data sources
User interface or presentation layer concerns

English.purpose: This document specifies the domain service responsible for managing user entities within the ArchSpine mirror system. It defines the core User structure and the UserService class that handles user creation, identity retrieval, and in-memory persistence.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers and architects working on the ArchSpine system who need to understand the domain logic for user management. It provides the foundational specification for how users are represented and managed within the system's core domain layer.
key_takeaways: The User entity is the core data structure for representing users in the system
UserService handles creation and identity retrieval operations
User data is stored in-memory as a temporary persistence mechanism
Unique user identifiers are generated through encapsulated domain logic

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了ArchSpine镜像系统中负责用户管理的领域服务规范。它描述了核心用户实体结构以及处理用户创建、身份检索和内存持久化的UserService类。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向ArchSpine系统的开发者和架构师，帮助他们理解用户管理的领域逻辑。它提供了用户如何在系统核心领域层中被表示和管理的基规范。
key_takeaways: User实体是系统中表示用户的核心数据结构
UserService负责处理用户创建和身份检索操作
用户数据通过内存存储作为临时持久化机制
唯一用户标识符通过封装的领域逻辑生成
